## Source: ossf-package-analysis (ad787034378f8dfd5ad9c74128aafad9b053f1296acc980aee3f70693f23d3c3)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'github-proto-repositories' @ 1.2.11.re9f78aa (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
